sections.paragraph: m. pr. a wink, hence a moment of time, see Kal No. 3 (like momentum for movimentum), Exo 33:5 Isa 54:7. בְּרֶגַע Job 21:13 כְּרֶגַע Psa 73:19 Lam 4:6, and רֶגַע Job 34:20, in a moment, suddenly, instantly. כִּמְעַט רֶגַע in a little moment, Isa 26:20 Ezr 9:8. לִרְגָעִים-(a) every moment, as often as possible, Job 7:18 Isa 27:3.-(b) suddenly, Eze 26:16.
